name: Muhammad Haidar
title: Full Stack Developer
bio: I am a Full Stack Developer passionate about building modern web and mobile applications. I enjoy creating scalable backend systems, developing responsive user interfaces, and integrating APIs to deliver efficient digital solutions.
bioExtended: I have experience developing various personal and internship projects using Laravel/Lumen, React, Flutter, and MySQL. From building REST APIs to creating responsive frontend applications, I enjoy turning ideas into functional products. I am highly motivated to learn new technologies, improve my problem-solving skills, and grow as a software developer.
